title:
Lesson 1:
Shopping
description: Shopping vocabulary: tienda (store), comprar (to buy), vender (to sell), precio (price), barato (cheap), caro (expensive).

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: How much does this shirt cost?

title:
Lesson 2:
Asking for prices
description: '¿Cuánto cuesta?' = How much does it cost? (singular), '¿Cuánto cuestan?' = How much do they cost? (plural).

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: How much do the apples cost?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: They cost two euros per kilo.
